checks.finding: No task's Requirements: field references any AC-NNN identifier; vacuously satisfied. AC references appear only in Scope/Done-When items, covered under AC-COVERAGE.
All 9 tasks have Blockers matching None or a comma-separated T-NNN list. No range notation or prose. blockers_format_valid=true in precheck-result.json.
All REQ-001..REQ-011 appear in at least one task's Requirements field (REQ-004->T-009, REQ-011->T-009, others unchanged). No uncovered requirements.
All AC-001..AC-017 are explicitly referenced in tasks.md and mapped consistently in traceability.md (AC-005/012/013->T-009; AC-011 T-001+T-004; AC-017 split T-001/T-004). No uncovered ACs.
Every task T-001..T-009 has a non-empty Requirements field citing at least one REQ-NNN. No orphan tasks.
T-002 (golden-test title) references AC-001/AC-002; T-007 and T-009 reference concrete ACs regardless of loanword title fragments. No orphan condition.
All 9 tasks show Approval: Draft and Status: Planned; valid for round 2.
All 9 pairings match the risk-gate-matrix: high->tdd (T-001..T-005, T-009), medium->acceptance-first (T-006, T-007), low->test-after (T-008, reverted per round-2 edit). workflow_match_precheck: PASS.
AC-017 is the only AC referenced by two tasks, with explicitly differentiated non-overlapping sub-scopes (T-001 too-large/not-sdd-root; T-004 not-found). Not duplicate testing.
Every Blockers reference resolves to a node in dependency-graph.json (9 nodes). No dangling blocker references.
DFS over the 15 edges found no cycle; valid DAG consistent with the stated execution order.

T-009 (resources 5種 + next-command 決定論マッピング + Inspector smoke) bundles two distinct feature concerns under REQ-004 (5 resources, AC-013) and REQ-011 (next-command deterministic mapping, AC-012), each with its own goal, test directory, and acceptance criterion. Neither is verification work tied to the other. This creates ambiguous execution/rollback granularity: the single Rollback field would revert both features together even if only one needed correction. (Inspector smoke as whole-server verification is acceptable.) T-001/T-003/T-004 multi-part titles are acceptable single coherent concerns.
All Done-When items name concrete inspectable outcomes (AC pass criteria with named error codes, named evidence artifacts, named CI checks). No forbidden vague verbs.
All 9 task IDs have corresponding entries in traceability.md REQ->Task and AC->TEST->Task tables; all REQ IDs exist in requirements.md. No dangling references.
